ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "year_1" INTEGER /* Year of the first census data */,
  "year_2" INTEGER /* Year of the second census data */,
  "nhgisnam_1" TEXT /* NHGIS name for the first county */,
  "nhgisst_1" INTEGER /* NHGIS state code for the first county */,
  "nhgiscty_1" INTEGER /* NHGIS county code for the first county */,
  "icpsrst_1" INTEGER /* ICPSR state code for the first county */,
  "icpsrcty_1" INTEGER /* ICPSR county code for the first county */,
  "icpsrnam_1" TEXT /* ICPSR name for the first county */,
  "statenam_1" TEXT /* State name for the first county */,
  "gisjoin_1" TEXT /* GIS join identifier for the first county */,
  "nhgisnam_2" TEXT /* NHGIS name for the second county */,
  "nhgisst_2" INTEGER /* NHGIS state code for the second county */,
  "nhgiscty_2" INTEGER /* NHGIS county code for the second county */,
  "icpsrst_2" INTEGER /* ICPSR state code for the second county */,
  "icpsrcty_2" INTEGER /* ICPSR county code for the second county */,
  "icpsrnam_2" TEXT /* ICPSR name for the second county */,
  "statenam_2" TEXT /* State name for the second county */,
  "gisjoin_2" TEXT /* GIS join identifier for the second county */,
  "population_1" INTEGER /* Population for the first year */,
  "population_2" INTEGER /* Population for the second year */,
  "land_area_1" REAL /* Total land area for the first year */,
  "land_area_2" REAL /* Total land area for the second year */,
  "housing_units_1" INTEGER /* Number of housing units for the first year */,
  "housing_units_2" INTEGER /* Number of housing units for the second year */,
  "median_age_1" REAL /* Median age for the first year */,
  "median_age_2" REAL /* Median age for the second year */,
  "median_income_1" REAL /* Median income for the first year */,
  "median_income_2" REAL /* Median income for the second year */,
  "race_distribution_1" TEXT /* Racial distribution for the first year (JSON format) */,
  "race_distribution_2" TEXT /* Racial distribution for the second year (JSON format) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution_1" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution for the first year (JSON format) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution_2" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution for the second year (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated census record */,
  "area_1" REAL /* Total area of the first county in square meters */,
  "area_2" REAL /* Total area of the second county in square meters */,
  "area_intersection" REAL /* Area of intersection between the two counties in square meters */,
  "population_density_1" REAL /* Population density for the first year */,
  "population_density_2" REAL /* Population density for the second year */,
  "housing_density_1" REAL /* Housing density for the first year */,
  "housing_density_2" REAL /* Housing density for the second year */,
  "area_difference" REAL /* Difference in area between the two years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated census record */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Weight value associated with the census record */,
  "weight_count" INTEGER /* Count of records contributing to the weight value */,
  "weight_description" TEXT /* Description of what the weight value represents */,
  "weight_source" TEXT /* Source of the weight value (e.g., survey, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which census data is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NHGIS, ICPSR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file on the server */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
